data.name: Company has an approved Data Management Policy
data.description: This test verifies that your company has an approved [Data Management Policy](/policies/data-management-policy-bsi) in Vanta.
data.failureDescription: You don't have an approved Data Management Policy yet.
data.remediationDescription: Use our [policy templates](/policies?policy=Data%20Management%20Policy) to create and approve a custom Data Management Policy for your company.
